title: Shanks Laughs Off Luffy’s Anger
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Luffy leaves his home carrying the promise he made to Shanks.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BEING A PIRATE ISN'T ALL FUN AND GAMES, YOU KNOW...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: there's lot's of duties like... pillaging, hostage- taking, heavy drinking... and SWIMMING!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND THE CAPTAIN KNOWS ALL ABOUT THE DANGERS OF THE SEA, TOO!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: IT CAN KILL YOU IN A THOUSAND WAYS!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: IT'S NOT THAT HE WANTS TO CRUSH YOUR DREAM OF BECOMING A PIRATE.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: 'Well I don't believe it!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Shanks just likes to make me look dumb.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, anchor!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Told you!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN SHANKS! I'm glad to see you and your crew are enjoying yourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HO boy... I just love making fun of this kid!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HMM... MAYBE THE LAD'S GOT A POINT...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Luffy, would you like something to eat?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Yeah! Just put it on my TREASURE TAB!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: TREASURE TAB? LOOK BOY, DON'T TRY TO SWINDLE THE LADY.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'm gonna become a pirate, find lots of treasure, and then I'll come back and pay her!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: HAHAHA! WE'LL CELE- BRATE TO- GETHER WHEN YOU RETURN.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: HEE HEE

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Shanks...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: YEAH KID....?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How much longer will you stay at this village?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Hmm... let's see...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: WE'VE BEEN USING THIS VILLAGE AS OUR BASE FOR ABOUT A YEAR...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AFTER TWO OR THREE MORE VOYA- GES...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: ...WE'LL LEAVE HERE FOR GOOD AND HEAD NORTH.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: see...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Two or three more trips, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'M GONNA LEARN HOW TO SWIM BY THE TIME YOU LEAVE!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: That's good kid...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: DO WHATEVER YOU WANT.

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: Make way for the scourage of the mountains!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HEH HEH... SO YOU CALL YOUR- SELLVES PIRATES, EH?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: First time I've seen pirates... you look like a sorry lot to me.

summary: Shanks Laughs Off Luffy’s Anger is the main story beat of this section. The dialogue and reactions show how the chapter’s conflict develops, while the scene keeps the focus on the characters’ choices rather than technical OCR structure.
